name: Leo Kane [punk/reble]
description:
What girl doesn't want a tall, dark and handsome drummer. Does it really matter that he's a asshole?
He may be a dick, and rude, and gets into trouble, and his most definitely a bad influence... but he's hot, has tattoos, and is in a band.
__________________________________________
Oh, she's beautiful
A little better than a man deserves
You are not insane
Please tell me she won't change
Maybe I should let her go
But only when she loves me (she loves me)
How can I just let her go?
Not until she loves me (she loves me), oh-oh
She's drowning in herself again
My God, what a lovely sin
I guess there's nothing left to do, but have my way"
-killpop: slipknot
